zh.lifeSummary: 當Susannah Browne於1617年9月4日出生在英國素福爾可阿爾德林加姆時，她的父親John Browne26歲，母親Alice Lake22歲。她於1640年與Nathan Fiske在英國素福爾可阿爾德林加姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1662年4月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年44歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德法明頓普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susannah Browne于1617年9月4日出生在英国素福爾可阿爾德林加姆时，她的父亲John Browne26岁，母亲Alice Lake22岁。她于1640年与Nathan Fiske在英国素福爾可阿爾德林加姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1662年4月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年44岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德法明頓普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Susannah Browne was born on 4 September 1617, in Aldringham, Suffolk, England, her father, John Browne, was 26 and her mother, Alice Lake, was 22. She married Nathan Fiske in 1640, in St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 April 1662, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 44, and was buried in Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susannah Browne est née le 4 septembre 1617, à Aldringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Browne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Lake, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Nathan Fiske en 1640, à St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1662, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susannah Browne am 4. September 1617 in Aldringham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Browne 26 und ihre Mutter Alice Lake 22. Sie hat 1640 in St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, England Nathan Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. April 1662 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Browne è nata il il 4 settembre 1617 nel Aldringham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Browne, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice Lake, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Nathan Fiske nel 1640, nel St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1662, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Susannah Browneが1617年9月4日にイギリススフォルクアルドリンガムで生まれた時，父John Browneは26歳，母Alice Lakeは22歳であった。1640年にイギリススフォルクアルドリンガムスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチでNathan Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1662年4月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで44歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードファルミントンプレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susannah Browne(이)가 1617년 9월 4일 영국 수폴크 올드링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Browne(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Lake(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1640년 영국 수폴크 올드링함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에서 Nathan Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1662년 4월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 패밍턴 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Browne nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1617, em Aldringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Browne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Lake, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathan Fiske em 1640, em St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1662, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susannah Browne родилась 4 сентября 1617 г. в местности алдрингхам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Browne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Lake, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathan Fiske в 1640 г. в местности ст андрю'с чурч, алдрингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 апреля 1662 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности плеис, фармингтон, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susannah Browne nació el 4 de septiembre de 1617, en Aldringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Browne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Lake, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Nathan Fiske en 1640, en St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1662, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
